summary: Completed comprehensive testing of wedding photography dashboard app. Backend APIs mostly functional (91.7% success), frontend renders correctly with authentication, theme switching works. Minor SelectItem component error and user menu interaction issues found.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 520 server error when user has existing events data, works fine with empty data
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Endpoint works correctly for users without events

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem component has value prop error: 'must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
ui_bugs.selector: SelectItem component in Add Event dialog

ui_bugs.issue: User menu button click timeout - dropdown not responding to clicks

design_issues.issue: Mobile menu button not visible at 390px viewport width

passed_tests: Login page renders with Google OAuth button
Authentication endpoint /api/auth/me works with session tokens
Package CRUD operations (create, read, update) working
Event CRUD operations (create, read, update) working
Stats cards display correctly (yearly/monthly income, pending deposits, next event)
Theme switcher opens with 6 gradient themes (3 dark + 3 light modes)

medium_priority: Fix SelectItem component error in Add Event dialog - ensure value prop is not empty string
Fix user menu dropdown click timeout issue
Debug income/summary endpoint 520 error when processing events data
low_priority: Fix mobile menu button visibility at 390px viewport
Test Google Calendar integration with actual OAuth flow
